spells.name: Necrotize
spells.summary: Necrotize a foe's body, harming and randomly debilitating them.

spells.name: Nudge the Odds
spells.summary: Cheat at gambling.

spells.name: Nullify
spells.summary: React to automatically counteract a spell and take backlash damage.

spells.name: Ocular Overload
spells.summary: Set a contingency to interfere with the vision of a creature attacking you.

spells.name: One with the Land
spells.summary: Merge into a natural feature to control the nearby environment.

spells.name: Oneiric Mire
spells.summary: Create illusory quicksand that tricks creatures into thinking they're stuck.

spells.name: Ooze Form
spells.summary: Turn into an ooze battle form.

spells.name: Organsight
spells.summary: See a foe's organs, and use your knowledge to deal precision damage.

spells.name: Painful Vibrations
spells.summary: Damage, deafen, and sicken a foe with sonic vibrations.

spells.name: Pernicious Poltergeist
spells.summary: Call forth a poltergeist to make mischief.

spells.name: Persistent Servant
spells.summary: Summon a long-term unseen servant for a single task.

spells.name: Petal Storm
spells.summary: A storm of razor-sharp petals slash creatures in the area.

spells.name: Phantom Crowd
spells.summary: Create an illusory crowd that loudly agrees with you.

spells.name: Phantom Prison
spells.summary: Trap a creature in illusory walls until it disbelieves.

spells.name: Portrait of the Artist
spells.summary: Appear to have the features and skills of a famous artist.

spells.name: Positive Attunement
spells.summary: Attune a creature to the Positive Energy Plane, healing a living creature or damaging an undead.

spells.name: Prismatic Armor
spells.summary: Multicolored armor dazzles foes and protects against many damage types.

spells.name: Proliferating Eyes
spells.summary: You implant a contagious, scrying eye that spreads to others by touch.

spells.name: Protect Companion
spells.summary: Shield your eidolon or minion from harm.

spells.name: Quick Sort
spells.summary: Automatically sort many objects.

spells.name: Rapid Adaptation
spells.summary: Adapt your companion or eidolon to your environment.

spells.name: Ravenous Portal
spells.summary: Door turns into a mimic when others try to open it.

spells.name: Read the Air
spells.summary: Pick up societal cues.

spells.name: Repelling Pulse
spells.summary: Telekinetically knock creatures back and damage them with force.

spells.name: Replicate
spells.summary: Create an illusory duplicate of a creature.

spells.name: Restyle
spells.summary: Make permanent style changes to clothing.

spells.name: Rewinding Step
spells.summary: Anchor your location in time so you can quickly return.

spells.name: Rip the Spirit
spells.summary: Tear at a living creature's spirit with negative energy to damage and drain it.

spells.name: Roaring Applause
spells.summary: Force the target to cheer and applaud you.

spells.name: Sanguine Mist
spells.summary: Create a cloud of life-draining fog that siphons vitality into you.

spells.name: Seashell of Stolen Sound
spells.summary: Copy a sound in a magical seashell.

spells.name: Shadow Army
spells.summary: Duplicate yourself to have your shadows fight enemies as you hide amongst them.

spells.name: Shadow Projectile
spells.summary: React when an ally makes a ranged attack to create a shadow double of the attack, distracting and damaging the foe.

spells.name: Shadow Raid
spells.summary: A swarm of illusory shadows damages foes in the area and provides concealment.

spells.name: Shift Blame
spells.summary: Trick someone into thinking someone else is to blame for your attack or blunder.

spells.name: Sonata Span
spells.summary: Manifest a path with a tune.

spells.name: Soothing Blossoms
spells.summary: Flowers assist recovery from persistent damage and afflictions.

spells.name: Soothing Spring
spells.summary: Create a rejuvenating hot spring that heals the wounded and tired.

spells.name: Spiritual Attunement
spells.summary: Attune to an aligned plane to protect yourself and harm creatures opposed to that plane.

spells.name: Sudden Recollection
spells.summary: Plant information in a creature's subconscious to be revealed on a trigger you choose.

spells.name: Summon Anarch
spells.summary: Summon a chaotic celestial, monitor, or fiend.

spells.name: Summon Archmage
spells.summary: Summon an incarnate archmage to fire magic missiles, stupefy foes, and tear away their spells.

spells.name: Summon Axiom
spells.summary: Summon a lawful celestial, monitor, or fiend.

spells.name: Summon Deific Herald
spells.summary: Summon an incarnate representative of your deity, with effects depending on alignment.

spells.name: Summon Draconic Legion
spells.summary: Summon an incarnate legion of dragons to destroy your foes.

spells.name: Summon Kaiju
spells.summary: Summon an incarnate kaiju with effects depending on the specific kaiju.

spells.name: Summoner's Precaution
spells.summary: Set a contingency to avoid being knocked out alongside your eidolon.

spells.name: Summoner's Visage
spells.summary: Change your eidolon to cosmetically appear to be your identical twin.

spells.name: Synchronize
spells.summary: Place sigils on your targets that flash at a prespecified time.

spells.name: Tame
spells.summary: Make a domesticated animal friendlier to you.

spells.name: Tempest of Shades
spells.summary: Summon an incarnate tornado of undead shades to drain and frighten foes.

spells.name: Temporary Glyph
spells.summary: Quickly scribe a short-lived glyph to blast foes.

spells.name: Thicket of Knives
spells.summary: Illusory copies of your weapon arm improve your ability to feint.

spells.name: Thundering Dominance
spells.summary: Make your companion or eidolon intimidating and let it emit a sonic roar.

spells.name: Time Jump
spells.summary: Leap forward in time, moving swiftly.

spells.name: Timely Tutor
spells.summary: Connect your eidolon or familiar to the Akashic Record to briefly grant it knowledge.

spells.name: Tortoise and the Hare
spells.summary: Quicken an ally and slow a foe.

spells.name: Umbral Extraction
spells.summary: Attempt to steal a spell slot.

spells.name: Umbral Graft
spells.summary: Attempt to steal an active spell.

spells.name: Unexpected Transposition
spells.summary: React to switch places with a creature.

spells.name: Unspeakable Shadow
spells.summary: Transform a creature's shadow into a frightening monster and make them flee or fight it.

spells.name: Variable Gravity
spells.summary: Adjust gravity's grip between high, low, and normal gravity.

spells.name: Voracious Gestalt
spells.summary: Create a spirit gestalt that eats souls and grows stronger.

spells.name: Wall of Water
spells.summary: Create a wall of water, forcing foes to swim through.

spells.name: Warding Aggression
spells.summary: Strike an enemy to improve your defense against it, and extend the spell with further attacks.

spells.name: Warrior's Regret
spells.summary: Regrets overcome a foe when they harm others.

spells.name: Wash Your Luck
spells.summary: Ignore misfortune once.

spells.name: Web of Eyes
spells.summary: Put scrying sensors on creatures, allowing them to share their vision with others.

spells.name: Whirlwind
spells.summary: Create a moving tornado to damage creatures and raise them into the air.

spells.name: Winning Streak
spells.summary: Quicken a target and make its critical hits spread the quickness.

spells.name: Zero Gravity
spells.summary: Remove gravity in an area.

spells.name: Cascade Countermeasure
spells.summary: You quickly adjust your Arcane Cascade to offer magical protection.

spells.name: Dimensional Assault
spells.summary: You tumble through space, making a short dimensional hop to better position yourself for an attack.

spells.name: Force Fang
spells.summary: You briefly turn your attack into pure force to bypass your opponent's defenses.

spells.name: Hasted Assault
spells.summary: You call upon your magic to speed up your attacks.

spells.name: Runic Impression
spells.summary: Your unarmed attacks or weapon gain the benefits of a weapon rune you choose when you cast this spell.

spells.name: Shielding Strike
spells.summary: As you attack a foe, warding magic transforms your momentum into action and lifts your shield.

spells.name: Shooting Star
spells.summary: You let loose a projectile that flies true and leaves the blazing trail of a meteor behind it.

spells.name: Spinning Staff
spells.summary: You spin your staff with a twirling flourish, attacking two foes and transforming the momentum into magical energy to charge for your next Spellstrike.

spells.name: Thunderous Strike
spells.summary: You swing your massive weapon, creating a wave of sonic vibrations that topples creatures.

spells.name: Boost Eidolon
spells.summary: You focus deeply on the link between you and your eidolon and boost the power of your eidolon's attacks.

spells.name: Eidolon's Wrath
spells.summary: Your eidolon releases a powerful energy attack.

spells.name: Evolution Surge
spells.summary: You flood your eidolon with power, creating a temporary evolution in your eidolon's capabilities.

spells.name: Extend Boost
spells.summary: You focus on the intricacies of the magic binding you to your eidolon to extend the duration of your boost eidolon or reinforce eidolon spell.

spells.name: Lifelink Surge
spells.summary: You make a quick gesture, tracing the link between yourself and your eidolon and drawing on your connection to slowly strengthen your shared life force.

spells.name: Reinforce Eidolon
spells.summary: You focus deeply on the link between you and your eidolon and reinforce your eidolon's defenses.

spells.name: Unfetter Eidolon
spells.summary: You loosen the link between yourself and your eidolon, allowing it to travel farther from you for a short period of time.

spells.name: Darklight
spells.summary: Shadows pour forth from your eyes, creating a field of darkness that prevents light from emanating within the area.

spells.name: Inscrutable Mask
spells.summary: You shroud your form and features in an impenetrable mask of shadow.

spells.name: Efficient Apport
spells.summary: Walking over to an item to pick it up is so much effort.

spells.name: Catch Your Name
spells.summary: You learn a private name (but not the true name) of the creature who spoke your name, as well as their precise location, unless they succeed at a Will save to negate the effect.

spells.name: Compel True Name
spells.summary: You instruct the target to do something, compelling obedience by calling it by its true name.

spells.name: Invoke True Name
spells.summary: You speak the true name of a creature to more surely affect it with your magic.

spells.name: Clawsong
spells.summary: You sing a fierce prayer, low and growling, and awaken the ancient spirit of a Terwa beast to guide and strengthen the target's unarmed blows.

spells.name: Gasping Marsh
spells.summary: With a rattling hiss, you create a quickly evaporating mist of invisible poisonous marsh gas to smother creatures in the area.

spells.name: Girzanje's March
spells.summary: You sing a prayer for war, inspiring valor in allies who hear your song.

spells.name: Stormburst
spells.summary: Your voice projects like cracking thunder as you summon a localized storm, creating a fearsome surge of lightning and wind.

spells.name: Swampcall
spells.summary: You call upon the spirits of the soil to twist and churn, transforming the terrain in the targeted area into a sodden mess.

spells.name: Blackfinger's Blades
spells.summary: You pray for swift and painful death to your enemies and find your and your allies' weapons blessed to deliver just that.

spells.name: Gray Shadow
spells.summary: You pray over a dying creature, drawing its shadow into your service as long as its owner is stooped at death's door.

spells.name: Mirecloak
spells.summary: You wrap the targeted creatures in thin, sickly green shrouds that sap information from attackers.

spells.name: Return to Essence
spells.summary: You unravel the magic of a spell that affects a container, door, or lock, converting it into energy you can repurpose to power your own spells.

spells.name: Temporal Ward
spells.summary: You ward a target doorway or container with a temporal trap that rewinds the personal timeline of creatures trying to open it.

spells.name: Hypnopompic Terrors
spells.summary: You send a wave of nightmarish visions crashing over your targets, leaving them paralyzed by fear.

spells.name: Lure Dream
spells.summary: You reach out to the dream realm, beckoning an animate dream to your side.

spells.name: Gritty Wheeze
spells.summary: You exhale desiccating grit and sand in a small cloud.

spells.name: Nettleskin
spells.summary: Thorns sprout from your body; they pass through and don't damage any clothing or armor you wear.

spells.name: Impart Empathy
spells.summary: You expand the target's ability to understand social cues that are normally beyond its comprehension.

spells.name: Pack Attack
spells.summary: You and one other target gain an uncanny coordination that helps you take down foes.

spells.name: Painted Scout
spells.summary: You press your hand to the stone, causing hand-drawn scouts to spread out from your fingers.

spells.name: Bone Spray
spells.summary: You fire a torrent of jagged bone shards from your hands.

spells.name: Boneshaker
spells.summary: You reach out a hand and seize a creature's skeleton from afar, harming their body and potentially wrenching them by the bones to move them against their will.

spells.name: Dinosaur Fort
spells.summary: You conjure a primeval fort with walls of sharpened wood adorned with dinosaur skin and teeth, up to 300 feet on a side.

spells.name: Elephant Form
spells.summary: You channel the primal forces of nature to transform into a Large battle form, specifically that of a powerful and terrifying elephant or similar creature, such as a mammoth, mastodon, or anancus.

spells.name: Far Sight
spells.summary: You can see distant objects as if they were closer.

spells.name: Incendiary Fog
spells.summary: You summon a cloud of flammable black dust.

spells.name: Hallowed Ground
spells.summary: One small space becomes inhospitable to undead as you fill it with life-infused benevolent magic.

spells.name: Eyes of the Dead
spells.summary: You enter a magical trance that allows you to perceive through the senses of the target creature.

spells.name: Shambling Horror
spells.summary: You reanimate the corpse of a fallen creature as an undead minion under your control.

spells.name: Subjugate Undead
spells.summary: You attempt to seize control of the target undead.

spells.name: Sage's Curse
spells.summary: You afflict the target with a curse that fills its mind with distracting and hyperspecialized minutiae, causing it to second-guess even simple facts.

spells.name: For Love, For Lightning
spells.summary: When you Cast the Spell, you plunge the required weapon into the ground, where it crackles with crimson lightning.

spells.name: Buffeting Winds
spells.summary: You release a quick burst of wind that batters your living opponents without causing them lasting harm, while also blowing undead away.

spells.name: Consecrate Flesh
spells.summary: Through the strength of your faith, your body becomes infused with holy energy.

spells.name: Detect Creator
spells.summary: You examine the remains or spiritual residue of a destroyed undead creature to locate that undead's creator, perhaps a necromancer or vampire.

spells.name: Empathic Link
spells.summary: You forge a bond between yourself and the target, enabling you to feel each other's emotions.

spells.name: Enhance Senses
spells.summary: You enhance the target's senses.

spells.name: Erase Trail
spells.summary: You drastically reduce all signs of one specific creature's passage from the area, including footprints, handprints, dirt, and minor changes caused to the surrounding environment, like the bending of grass.

spells.name: Life Pact
spells.summary: Using your life force or spirit as a conduit, you bind the targets in a mystical pact.

spells.name: Martyr's Intervention
spells.summary: You shield a creature in dire need with your own life force, taking the harm upon yourself to save their life.

spells.name: Purifying Icicle
spells.summary: You evoke life essence into the form of water and freeze it, then launch the icicle at a foe.

spells.name: Radiant Beam
spells.summary: You fire a beam of blinding light from your outstretched hands.

spells.name: Scouring Pulse
spells.summary: You inundate the area with concentrated positive energy, which scours away the stain of undeath.

spells.name: Sign of Conviction
spells.summary: You conjure the religious symbol of your deity into the air above you in the same space you stand in, wielding the power of your faith to smite your foes.

spells.name: Synchronize Steps
spells.summary: You link the minds of two targets, enabling them to move in tandem.

spells.name: Wall of Virtue
spells.summary: You create a translucent wall of light, which draws power from the celestial realms.

spells.name: Inside Ropes
spells.summary: You pull a large handful of guts from your midsection.

spells.name: Horrifying Blood Loss
spells.summary: You curse the target, filling it with terror at the loss of its blood.

spells.name: Shadow Zombie
spells.summary: You cast a shadow over the target zombie, briefly turning it into shadowy vapor and controlling its movement.

spells.name: Swallow Light
spells.summary: You draw magical light into your open mouth, consuming it and turning its essence into fuel for a gout of life-draining shadows.

spells.name: Teeth to Terror
spells.summary: The target believes its teeth are falling out, crawling along its face, stabbing into its body, and cramming themselves down its throat.

spells.name: Umbral Mindtheft
spells.summary: You prepare to steal a broad field of knowledge from another creature, siphoning it from their mind and storing it in a pocket of the Shadow Plane connected to your own mind.

spells.name: Vicious Jealousy
spells.summary: The target is overcome by deep jealousy and resentment that twists its mind against other creatures.

spells.name: Blind Eye
spells.summary: You enchant a single object, preventing it from being used for magical observation.

spells.name: Blood Duplicate
spells.summary: This spell deals you 1 piercing damage as you shape a magical duplicate of the target from your blood; you can't cast this spell if you don't have blood.

spells.name: Caster's Imposition
spells.summary: A magical interference prevents the target from contributing to any form of cooperative spellcasting.

spells.name: Hag's Fruit
spells.summary: You imbue a single piece of fruit with a curse that leaves its victims in a magical sleep.

spells.name: Ritual Obstruction
spells.summary: You establish a zone of magical feedback that makes it impossible to succeed at rituals of this spell's level or lower in the area.

spells.name: Web of Influence
spells.summary: You learn the location of the nearest creature to whom the target is connected in a magical manner.

spells.name: Bralani Referendum
spells.summary: You enforce fair play with punishing zephyrs.

spells.name: Celestial Accord
spells.summary: You intervene in a heated disagreement between two creatures, encouraging them to put aside their differences and find some common ground.

spells.name: Elysian Whimsy
spells.summary: You overwhelm the target with an unexpected and unpredictable desire if it fails a Will save.

spells.name: Mantle of Heaven's Slopes
spells.summary: You surround yourself in a mantle of heavenly power, invoking the power of the layers of the celestial mountain above.

spells.name: Movanic Glimmer
spells.summary: You give the target animal a glimmer of awareness, not truly awakening it but allowing it to better understand its surroundings.

spells.name: Procyal Philosophy
spells.summary: The racoon-like visage of a sagacious procyal appears, dispensing helpful advice.

spells.name: Radiant Heart of Devotion
spells.summary: You speak a fervent prayer for the heavens to assist you and your righteous allies.

spells.name: Soulshelter Vessel
spells.summary: You connect the spirit of the target creature with the target object, giving their spirit a durable vessel that protects and empowers their body.

spells.name: Undertaker
spells.summary: You point your finger toward the target and whisper an epitaph that promises to grace their gravestone in the near future.

spells.name: Inkshot
spells.summary: A spray of viscous, toxic ink jets from your fingertip to strike a target creature in the face.

spells.name: Phantasmal Protagonist
spells.summary: You create a phantasmal incarnation of a significant character from a novel, historical work, or religious parable.

spells.name: Transcribe Conflict
spells.summary: You cause a sheet of paper to appear in your hand, and a moment later a detailed description of a combat you experienced within the last hour is recorded on that sheet of paper in a language that you know of your choice.

spells.name: Word of Revision
spells.summary: As all good writers know, you shouldn't kill off your protagonist before their story is complete.

spells.name: Blazing Blade
spells.summary: A scimitar-shaped beam of fiery light springs from your free hand.

spells.name: Dawnflower's Light
spells.summary: The object glows with soft golden light that lays bare the truth, reveals hidden objects, and shines supernatural light on false orders.

spells.name: Infectious Ennui
spells.summary: With a wave of your hand and a short invocation, you cause feelings of ennui and impending doom to well up in the mind of the targeted creature, who must attempt a Will save.

spells.name: Aqueous Blast
spells.summary: You evoke a mass of water into the air around your outstretched fist.

spells.name: Scorching Blast
spells.summary: You evoke a mass of fire into the air around your outstretched fist.

spells.name: Vision of Beauty
spells.summary: You create a phantasmal image of the most beautiful creature imaginable to the target at a location somewhere within the spell's range.

spells.name: Curse of the Spirit Orchestra
spells.summary: You summon an invisible, insubstantial group of extraplanar musicians who follow the target and play distracting music to hinder its actions.

spells.name: Infectious Comedy
spells.summary: You tell a magical joke and infect a target with laughter that spreads to those nearby.

spells.name: Unblinking Flame Aura
spells.summary: You focus your sight inside and call on your inner fire to grant you warmth, steady your vision, and soothe your body.

spells.name: Unblinking Flame Emblem
spells.summary: You emblazon the target with a fiery sigil that projects your sight and your flame onto them, allowing you and your allies to track their movements and making it easier to hit them.

spells.name: Unblinking Flame Ignition
spells.summary: You feel the most alive when pushed into a corner, as the insights and vision granted by the flame stoke into overdrive.

spells.name: Unbreaking Wave Barrier
spells.summary: You create a protective circle around yourself that repels your foes.

spells.name: Unbreaking Wave Containment
spells.summary: You wrap enemies in four strands of water.

spells.name: Unbreaking Wave Vapor
spells.summary: You're concealed against the triggering attack and gain a +2 circumstance bonus to AC against it.

spells.name: Unfolding Wind Blitz
spells.summary: You blitz forward so quickly that you soar through the air, and nothing can react to you.

spells.name: Unfolding Wind Buffet
spells.summary: You surround your unarmed attacks with the speed and force of air.

spells.name: Unfolding Wind Crash
spells.summary: You jump up to 120 feet in any direction and then deal 18d6 bludgeoning damage to creatures within a 20-foot emanation after you land, with a basic Reflex save.

spells.name: Untwisting Iron Augmentation
spells.summary: Your unarmed attacks are treated as cold iron and silver, they gain the earth trait, and they gain a +1 status bonus to damage rolls per damage die.

spells.name: Untwisting Iron Pillar
spells.summary: You call upon the earth and your ki to shield you from your enemies.

spells.name: Untwisting Iron Roots
spells.summary: You manipulate the earth beneath your feet to throw your enemies off balance, leaving chunks of rock and rubble behind.

spells.name: Summon Ancient Fleshforged
spells.summary: You summon an ancient Fleshforged, one of Nex's personal weaponized monstrosities unleashed in the first wars against Geb.

spells.name: Summon Healing Servitor
spells.summary: You call forth a servitor forged from raw positive energy to heal and bolster your allies.

spells.name: Ancient Dust
spells.summary: You cough up a cloud of gray soil.

spells.name: Bound in Death
spells.summary: You tether another creature's spirit to your own, shunting part of the damage dealt to you onto one of your foes.

spells.name: Dirge of Remembrance
spells.summary: You sing a funereal dirge to force restless spirits to fully manifest in the Material Plane.

spells.name: Excise Lexicon
spells.summary: You reach into a creature's mind and extract its knowledge of a word.

spells.name: Flense
spells.summary: With a touch, you strip off the flesh, muscle, and internal organs off your target, leaving only bare bones.

spells.name: Ravenous Darkness
spells.summary: You create a shroud of magical darkness that feeds on those inside it.

spells.name: Spiritual Torrent
spells.summary: You release your spiritual essence in a torrential blast of energy, dealing 10d6 damage.

spells.name: Steal Voice
spells.summary: You steal a creature's voice, rendering them mute.

spells.name: Suffocate
spells.summary: You forcefully and cruelly draw the living breath from a creature's lungs, dealing 4d8 bludgeoning damage.

spells.name: Torturous Trauma
spells.summary: You batter a creature's internal organs, leaving no external signs of the immense pain you delivered.

spells.name: Frost's Touch
spells.summary: Your gelid shard drinks down nearby heat in a futile attempt to sate itself and achieve a level of frigid cold unheard of on the Material Plane.

spells.name: Belittling Boast
spells.summary: You boast about your skills or combat prowess, bolstering your own abilities and belittling your opponents.

spells.name: Blinding Foam
spells.summary: You spray a colorful, caustic foam into the target's eyes, which clings to their face.

spells.name: Bursting Bloom
spells.summary: You cause a rose bush to sprout from the chest of a foe, bursting out of its body and wrapping it in thorned vines.

spells.name: Confetti Cloud
spells.summary: You conjure a dense storm of swirling confetti.

spells.name: Cutting Insult
spells.summary: You utter an insult so offensive that it cuts your target to the quick.

spells.name: Fashionista
spells.summary: The target's clothes are transformed into ostentatious attire that epitomizes high-end local fashion.

spells.name: Firework Blast
spells.summary: You create a massive display of loud and colorful explosions.

spells.name: Flashy Disappearance
spells.summary: You create a puff of colorful smoke that quickly disperses while you become temporarily invisible.

spells.name: Helpful Steps
spells.summary: You call forth a ladder or staircase to help you reach greater heights.

spells.name: Illusory Shroud
spells.summary: You shroud the target in subtle illusions that make it difficult to detect.

spells.name: Instant Parade
spells.summary: An illusory parade with dozens of participants and performers appears around you, following you as you move.

spells.name: Musical Accompaniment
spells.summary: You're surrounded by orchestral music that shifts and changes to match your behavior.

spells.name: Nothing Up My Sleeve
spells.summary: You create an extradimensional space within each of your sleeves.

spells.name: Overselling Flourish
spells.summary: You make a grand spectacle out of getting hit.

spells.name: Percussive Impact
spells.summary: You lob a compressed ball of sound at a foe.

spells.name: Rallying Banner
spells.summary: You create an illusory banner representing a revolution, social movement, or organization such as the Firebrands.

spells.name: Rose's Thorns
spells.summary: Rose bushes with razor-sharp thorns sprout from the ground in the area.

spells.name: Sparkleskin
spells.summary: You coat a creature's body in a layer of brilliantly sparkling glitter.

spells.name: Spy's Mark
spells.summary: By pressing your hand to a wall or other solid immobile surface, you cause the crossed-swords symbol of the Firebrands—or a different symbol of your choosing—to appear on the targeted surface.

spells.name: Unraveling Blast
spells.summary: You unleash a small blast of potential that destroys one of a creature's possible futures, leaving them reeling.

spells.name: Invoke the Harrow
spells.summary: You draw a card from the harrow, either one from a deck you have in hand or magically produce one as part of the spell.

spells.name: Rewrite Possibility
spells.summary: You continually glimpse into the target's future and nudge fate to guide them toward the best possible outcome.

spells.name: Glass Sand
spells.summary: You throw a handful of sand that transforms into jagged shards of glass.

spells.name: Cyclone Rondo
spells.summary: Playing or singing melodies discovered by the ancient Shory, you call up a whirlwind

spells.name: Forge
