spells.name: Ranger's Bramble
spells.summary: You cause plants in the area to entangle your foes, with the effects of entangling flora.

spells.name: Hunter's Vision
spells.summary: Your target glows with a magical aura visible only to you and those who follow your lead.

spells.name: Terrain Transposition
spells.summary: You mystically transpose your current location with another.

spells.name: Blood Ward
spells.summary: Your patron's aegis descends to shield a target from harm.

spells.name: Cackle
spells.summary: With a quick burst of laughter, you prolong a magical effect you created.

spells.name: Curse of Death
spells.summary: Your patron wraps a hand around your target's heart.

spells.name: Deceiver's Cloak
spells.summary: Your patron drapes a cloak of illusion about you, making you appear as another creature of the same body shape with roughly similar height and weight as yourself.

spells.name: Elemental Betrayal
spells.summary: Your patron uses its superior command of the elements, empowering them to undermine your foe.

spells.name: Life Boost
spells.summary: Life force from your patron floods into the target, ensuring they can continue doing your patron's will for just a little longer.

spells.name: Malicious Shadow
spells.summary: Your patron warps the target's shadow into a deadly form, such as strangling hands, a dangerous weapon, harrying runes, or the like.

spells.name: Needle of Vengeance
spells.summary: A long, jagged needle jabs into the target foe's psyche whenever it tries to attack a creature your patron holds in special regard.

spells.name: Patron's Puppet
spells.summary: At your unspoken plea, your patron temporarily assumes control over your familiar.

spells.name: Personal Blizzard
spells.summary: Your patron's breath becomes a blizzard of obscuring, scouring ice that follows your target.

spells.name: Phase Familiar
spells.summary: Your patron momentarily recalls your familiar to the ether, shifting it from its solid, physical form into a ghostly version of itself.

spells.name: Restorative Moment
spells.summary: Your patron weaves the threads of time around the target, giving them some of the benefits of a day's passage.

spells.name: Veil of Dreams
spells.summary: Your patron draws the target into a drowsy state, causing daydreams and sluggishness.

spells.name: Clinging Ice
spells.summary: Freezing sleet and heavy snowfall collect on the target's feet and legs, dealing 1d4 cold damage and other effects depending on its Reflex save.

spells.name: Discern Secrets
spells.summary: Your patron deigns to whisper a few secrets.

spells.name: Evil Eye
spells.summary: Your patron's resentment manifests in a baleful, envious gaze.

spells.name: Nudge Fate
spells.summary: The barest spin of your patron's spool is enough to alter fate.

spells.name: Shroud of Night
spells.summary: Your patron blankets the target's eyes in darkness.

spells.name: Stoke the Heart
spells.summary: Your patron fills a creature with fervor, empowering their blows.

spells.name: Wilding Word
spells.summary: Your patron's majesty—or their displeasure—comes in a growl from your throat, making other creatures reluctant to harm you.

spells.name: Protective Wards
spells.summary: You expand a ring of glyphs that shields your allies.

spells.name: Rune of Observation
spells.summary: You inscribe an invisible eye-shaped rune in the air, creating a sensor as clairvoyance.

spells.name: Force Bolt
spells.summary: You fire an arrow-shaped bolt of force, one of the most common and reliable forms of battle magic.

spells.name: Energy Absorption
spells.summary: You're used to mitigating the damage done by bombs, siege engines, and magical artillery.

spells.name: Fortify Summoning
spells.summary: As you call a creature to your side, your magic transforms its body, heightening its ferocity and fortifying its resilience.

spells.name: Spiral of Horrors
spells.summary: Shades and spirits howl and whirl around you in a display that strikes fear into the hearts of all who witness it.

spells.name: Earthworks
spells.summary: With a ripple of earth, you raise small barriers from the ground.

spells.name: Community Restoration
spells.summary: When you use your magic to support your allies, shared strength bolsters you all.

spells.name: Charming Push
spells.summary: You push at the target's mind to deflect their ire.

spells.name: Invisibility Cloak
spells.summary: You become invisible, with the same restrictions as the 2nd-rank invisibility spell.

spells.name: Scramble Body
spells.summary: Your magic throws the creature's biology into disarray, inducing nausea, fever, and other unpleasant conditions.

spells.name: Shifting Form
spells.summary: You change your body to better suit the moment.

spells.name: Hand of the Apprentice
spells.summary: You take advantage of one of the most fundamental lessons of magic to levitate and propel your weapon.

spells.name: Interdisciplinary Incantation
spells.summary: You gather the embers of another caster's spell, using your understanding of unified magic to pick apart their formulas and incantations well enough to imitate the spell yourself, if only for a short time.

spells.name: Bonewall Bulwark
spells.summary: You create a miniature replica of the infamouse Bonewall of Yled.

spells.name: Carrion Mire
spells.summary: The ground opens into a seemingly endless mass of corpse limbs.

spells.name: Deathless March
spells.summary: You chant a marching song of Yled to empower the undead and terrify the living.

spells.name: Osseous Cage
spells.summary: You conjure a prison made of bone.

spells.name: Distracting Decoy
spells.summary: You conjure a colorful, fast-moving shape, such as a small bird or other animal that draws your target’s eye.

spells.name: Keen Smell
spells.summary: Your nose becomes more sensitive to the scents of the wild, the better for you to track your quarry.

spells.name: Slime Spit
spells.summary: You spit toxic goo that coats your target’s face and eyes, dealing 2d6 poison damage.

spells.name: Canopy Crawler
spells.summary: The target grows a prehensile tail, or gains prehensile qualities in their existing tail, to help them climb with ease.

spells.name: Imitate Fauna
spells.summary: You use your knowledge of nature to pass the target off as a common animal of the same size, representing a species chosen when the spell is cast.

spells.name: Threatening Mimicry
spells.summary: You appear larger and stronger to nearby creatures, appearing to possess threatening features like antlers, claws, or poison to their senses.

spells.name: Warning Stripes
spells.summary: Your skin becomes painted with vivid stripes or bright aposematic swirls, warning other creatures of its toxic qualities.

spells.name: Gluttonous Growth
spells.summary: Plants in the area grow rapidly, taking on carnivorous characteristics as they seek to consume prey.

spells.name: Pack Breaker
spells.summary: You can deceive creatures by changing their perception of their allies’ behavior.

spells.name: Pulverizing Wake
spells.summary: Imitating raptorial creatures, you attack with such speed it drives a sonic shockwave.

spells.name: Scrounger's Glee
spells.summary: With a cruel laugh and a flash of your canines, you make a target understand that death is coming to claim it and that its demise will serve to strengthen another.

spells.name: Sting of the Sea
spells.summary: A long tentacle like that belonging to an octopus, anemone, or man-of-war, dripping with briny water, appears from a glowing blue portal to wrap around the target’s face, blocking its vision.

spells.name: Murmuration
spells.summary: The target feels the brush of feathers against its skin and hears screeches in its ears, warning it to keep away from a creature you designate.

spells.name: Blood in the Water
spells.summary: Predators are drawn to the scent of blood, and blood can disperse shockingly far in the water.

spells.name: Mycological Malady
spells.summary: You infect your target with fungal spores to hasten the cycle of decay.

spells.name: Sheltering Wings
spells.summary: Like migratory birds, you know everyone flies farther together.

spells.name: Songbird's Call
spells.summary: Your voice calls a storm of songbirds that whirl around you and peck at your enemies.

spells.name: Spirit of the Beast
spells.summary: You bring out the spirit of another animal that lives within your companion.

spells.name: Albatross Curse
spells.summary: You create a spectral albatross, a guiding bird for sailors, to hover around the target.

spells.name: Antlion Trap
spells.summary: You transmute the ground into a conical pit trap of loose sand that becomes difficult terrain for the duration.

spells.name: Camel Spit
spells.summary: You alter your stomach, esophagus, and tongue to be able to spit partially digested food with force.

spells.name: Claws of the Otter
spells.summary: Webbing grows between your fingers and your nails extend into vicious claws.

spells.name: Confusing Cry
spells.summary: You give an unsettling, warbling cry that causes nearby creatures to lash out without control.

spells.name: Croak Voice
spells.summary: You cause the target creature’s vocal chords to swell like those of a frog.

spells.name: Foraging Friends
spells.summary: Giving a cheerful whistle, you call forth a handful of small animals, such as birds or mice, to collect food for you and your allies.

spells.name: Frog Tongue
spells.summary: Your tongue extends unnaturally, flicking out toward a creature within range and dealing bludgeoning damage.

spells.name: Hidebound
spells.summary: The target’s skin erupts in thick hide or dense scales.

spells.name: Hippocampus Retreat
spells.summary: You temporarily shape your lower limbs into the tail of a hippocampus in order to swim away from a nearby foe after dealing a parting blow.

spells.name: Luring Wail
spells.summary: You emit a plaintive cry to lure your enemies closer.

spells.name: Primal Chorus
spells.summary: You let loose a primal howl that incites animals and beasts to join in the chorus.

spells.name: Sacred Beasts
spells.summary: You call out to the creatures of the wild favored by your deity.

spells.name: Snake Fangs
spells.summary: Your jaw unhinges as your teeth extend into wicked fangs.

spells.name: Summon Stampede
spells.summary: You summon an unstoppable stampede of panicking beasts.

spells.name: Summon Warden of the Wild
spells.summary: You briefly call forth the spirit of one of the Wardens of the Wild, the legendary guardians of nature.

spells.name: Beastmaster Trance
spells.summary: You enter a trance that allows you to see through the senses of the target companion.

spells.name: Animal Vision
spells.summary: Project your senses through an animal.

spells.name: Animated Assault
spells.summary: Temporarily animate small objects to attack.

spells.name: Anointed Ground
spells.summary: Create a 24-hour area of protection against aberrations, celestials, dragons, fiends, monitors, or undead.

spells.name: Bestial Curse
spells.summary: Make a humanoid take on features of a beast.

spells.name: Blanket of Stars
spells.summary: A cloak of darkness hides you in the dark.

spells.name: Blinding Fury
spells.summary: Curse a creature to be unable to see its victims.

spells.name: Blister
spells.summary: Grow blisters on a creature and pop them to spray acid.

spells.name: Blistering Invective
spells.summary: Light a creature on fire with harsh words.

spells.name: Bullhorn
spells.summary: Magnify your voice to be heard at a distance.

spells.name: Carryall
spells.summary: A floating platform follows you, carrying objects.

spells.name: Chameleon Coat
spells.summary: Camouflage creatures to their environment.

spells.name: Charitable Urge
spells.summary: Make a creature give away an object.

spells.name: Chilling Spray
spells.summary: Icy shards fly out from you in a cone.

spells.name: Chroma Leach
spells.summary: Sap the color and vitality from a living creature.

spells.name: Cloak of Colors
spells.summary: Bright colors dazzle and blind creatures.

spells.name: Collective Transposition
spells.summary: Teleport up to two creatures to new positions near you.

spells.name: Concordant Choir
spells.summary: Damage foes with music.

spells.name: Confusing Colors
spells.summary: Dazzle, confuse, or stun creatures in a cloud.

spells.name: Containment
spells.summary: Seal a creature in a sphere to contain or protect it.

spells.name: Corrosive Muck
spells.summary: Create two puddles of acidic slime.

spells.name: Countless Eyes
spells.summary: Spawn magical eyes all over a creature’s body.

spells.name: Crashing Wave
spells.summary: Smash a cone of water against foes.

spells.name: Curse of Lost Time
spells.summary: Artificially erode or age a target.

spells.name: Déjà Vu
spells.summary: Make a creature do the same thing repeatedly.

spells.name: Dismantle
spells.summary: Disassemble an object temporarily.

spells.name: Dream Council
spells.summary: Communicate through a shared dream.

spells.name: Drop Dead
spells.summary: The target appears to die, but turns invisible.

spells.name: Dull Ambition
spells.summary: Curse a creature with a lack of ambition.

spells.name: Familiar’s Face
spells.summary: Implant your senses and voice in your companion.

spells.name: Final Sacrifice
spells.summary: Channel energy to blow up your minion.

spells.name: Fungal Infestation
spells.summary: Plant poisonous fungal growths in a creature.

spells.name: Gale Blast
spells.summary: Damage and push adjacent creatures with air.

spells.name: Ghostly Tragedy
spells.summary: Have spirits re-enact a violent event.

spells.name: Ghoulish Cravings
spells.summary: Afflict a creature with a craving for raw meat.

spells.name: Gravity Well
spells.summary: Pull all creatures towards the center of a sphere of altered gravity.

spells.name: Grisly Growths
spells.summary: A creature grows sickening limbs and organs.

spells.name: Haunting Hymn
spells.summary: A powerful hymn harms and deafens.

spells.name: Holy Cascade
spells.summary: Make an explosion of holy water.

spells.name: Ice Storm
spells.summary: Call a storm cloud that pelts creatures with hail.

spells.name: Imaginary Lockbox
spells.summary: Hide items in a mental compartment.

spells.name: Imprint Message
spells.summary: Put a false psychic imprint in an object.

spells.name: Invisible Item
spells.summary: Make an item disappear.

spells.name: Leaden Steps
spells.summary: Make creatures heavy and weak to electricity.

spells.name: Lifewood Cage
spells.summary: Trap a creature in a wooden cage.

spells.name: Lightning Storm
spells.summary: Create clouds and call down lightning.

spells.name: Live Wire
spells.summary: Slash and shock a creature with an electrified filament.

spells.name: Mud Pit
spells.summary: Conjure mud to slow movement.

spells.name: Nature’s Enmity
spells.summary: Turn animals, plants, and weather against foes.

spells.name: Noxious Vapors
spells.summary: Form a toxic cloud that poisons and sickens.

spells.name: Object Reading
spells.summary: Get psychic impressions from an object.

spells.name: Phantasmal Treasure
spells.summary: Tempt a creature with an illusory reward.

spells.name: Primal Herd
spells.summary: Transform willing creatures into a herd of mammoths.

spells.name: Protector Tree
spells.summary: Conjure a tree that guards allies.

spells.name: Puff of Poison
spells.summary: Exhale toxins to poison a foe.

spells.name: Reaper’s Lantern
spells.summary: A ghostly lantern diminishes healing for the living and weakens the undead.

spells.name: Resplendent Mansion
spells.summary: Conjure a towering mansion.

spells.name: Rouse Skeletons
spells.summary: Rouse a squadron of skeletons to claw foes.

spells.name: Sacred Form
spells.summary: Transform into a battle form with sacred armaments.

spells.name: Scatter Scree
spells.summary: Evoke rocks to bludgeon and create difficult terrain.

spells.name: Schadenfreude
spells.summary: Distract foes with their exultation at your failure.

spells.name: Scintillating Safeguard
spells.summary: Reactively form a protective barrier.

spells.name: Seal Fate
spells.summary: Curse a creature to be harmed by a type of damage.

spells.name: Shared Invisibility
spells.summary: You and nearby creatures become invisible.

spells.name: Shrink Item
spells.summary: Reduce an object to the size of a coin.

spells.name: Spell Riposte
spells.summary: Reflect a spell targeted at you.

spells.name: Spirit Sense
spells.summary: Detect spirits and haunts.

spells.name: Spirit Song
spells.summary: Sing a song that damages any creature with a spirit.

spells.name: Spiritual Epidemic
spells.summary: Weaken a target with a communicable curse.

spells.name: Spout
spells.summary: Batter creatures with a water blast.

spells.name: Strange Geometry
spells.summary: Confoundingly warp spatial geometry, making passage difficult and destinations unpredictable.

spells.name: Sudden Blight
spells.summary: Decay living creatures and plants.

spells.name: Summon Lesser Servitor
spells.summary: Summon a minor celestial, monitor, or fiend.

spells.name: Synesthesia
spells.summary: Rewire a creature’s senses.

spells.name: Telepathic Demand
spells.summary: Impel a creature with a mental message.

spells.name: Thoughtful Gift
spells.summary: Teleport an item to an ally’s grasp.

spells.name: Threefold Aspect
spells.summary: Shift yourself between three ages.

spells.name: Vampiric Maiden
spells.summary: An iron maiden steals a creature’s vitality.

spells.name: Visions of Danger
spells.summary: A vision of a swarm deals mental damage.

spells.name: Vomit Swarm
spells.summary: Vermin erupt in a cone from your mouth.

spells.name: Wall of Flesh
spells.summary: Spawn a wall of living flesh.

spells.name: Wanderer’s Guide
spells.summary: Find an ideal route to a location.

spells.name: Weapon of Judgment
spells.summary: Form a divine weapon of war or peace.

spells.name: Web
spells.summary: Form a web that keeps creatures from moving.

spells.name: Whispers of the Void
spells.summary: Drain creatures’ vigor with void energy.

spells.name: Lay on Hands
spells.summary: Your hands become infused with powerful vitality, capable of healing a living creature or damaging an undead creature with a touch.

spells.name: Touch of the Void
spells.summary: You infuse the target with void energy, healing undead or damaging a living creature.

spells.name: Shields of the Spirit
spells.summary: You Raise your Shield, causing ephemeral spirit shields to float within your champion's aura.

spells.name: Champion's Sacrifice
spells.summary: You form a link with an ally, allowing you to take harm in their stead.

spells.name: Hero's Defiance
spells.summary: You shout in defiance and are filled with a burst of healing.

spells.name: Spectral Advance
spells.summary: Taking on a spiritual form, you flash across the battlefield to engage an enemy.

spells.name: Inner Upheaval
spells.summary: You focus your qi into devastating magical attacks.

spells.name: Qi Rush
spells.summary: Accelerated by your qi, you move with such speed you become a blur.

spells.name: Qi Blast
spells.summary: You unleash your qi as a powerful blast that deals 2d6 force damage.

spells.name: Shrink the Span
spells.summary: The world seems to shrink before your footfalls.

spells.name: Medusa's Wrath
spells.summary: You make an attack filled with a medusa's petrifying power.

spells.name: Touch of Death
spells.summary: Make a melee unarmed Strike.

spells.name: Embrace Nothingness
spells.summary: You empty your body of substance, becoming one with nothingness.

spells.name: Qi Form
spells.summary: Drawing from deep wells of spiritual power, you take on a special qi form.

spells.name: Clinging Shadows Stance
spells.summary: You adopt the stance of clinging shadows.

spells.name: Wild Winds Stance
spells.summary: You take on the stance of the flowing winds, sending out waves of energy at a distance.

spells.name: Shadow's Web
spells.summary: Grasping darkness surges from you, dealing 14d4 void damage.

spells.name: Harmonize Self
spells.summary: You heal yourself in one of the following ways, chosen by you when you cast the spell.

spells.name: Wind Jump
spells.summary: You gain a fly Speed equal to your Speed.

spells.name: Ancestral Touch
spells.summary: You touch a creature and force them to see and feel the ancestors surrounding you.

spells.name: Ancestral Defense
spells.summary: Your ancestor protects you against those who would bend your will.

spells.name: Ancestral Form
spells.summary: You take the form of your ancestral spirits, becoming invisible and quasi-corporeal.

spells.name: Weapon Trance
spells.summary: The serenity of violence fills your mind, giving you a heightened sense of knowing exactly where your weapons need to be.

spells.name: Battlefield Persistence
spells.summary: You're difficult to deter in battle.

spells.name: Revel in Retribution
spells.summary: Time seems to slow for you, allowing you to strike your opponents mid-move.

spells.name: Soul Siphon
spells.summary: You siphon off a portion of the target's soul to bolster your own vitality.

spells.name: Armor of Bones
spells.summary: You ossify your physical form, mimicking the durability of bone.

spells.name: Claim Undead
spells.summary: You attempt to wrest control of a target undead or force it to recognize you as its master.

spells.name: Spray of Stars
spells.summary: You fling a spray of tiny shooting stars, dealing 2d4 fire damage.

spells.name: Interstellar Void
spells.summary: You call upon the frigid depths of outer space to bring a terrible chill to your enemy.

spells.name: Moonlight Bridge
spells.summary: You summon a bridge of radiant, shimmering moonlight.

spells.name: Incendiary Aura
spells.summary: You surround yourself with a combustible aura.

spells.name: Whirling Flames
spells.summary: You call forth a storm of whirling flames, engulfing all creatures in that area and dealing 5d6 fire damage with a basic Reflex save.

spells.name: Flaming Fusillade
spells.summary: You call upon an endless barrage of flames, a series of explosions bursting around you like miniature suns.

spells.name: Life Link
spells.summary: You forge a connection of life energy between you and your target, distributing harm between both of you.

spells.name: Delay Affliction
spells.summary: With a surge of healing energy, you push back against an affliction threatening the target and grant a small amount of healing.

spells.name: Life-Giving Form
spells.summary: You transcend your physical form, becoming a beacon of healing energy.

spells.name: Brain Drain
spells.summary: You probe the target's mind to glean knowledge.

spells.name: Access Lore
spells.summary: You sift through the multiverse's divine knowledge, seeking out tidbits related to a particular subject.

spells.name: Dread Secret
spells.summary: You utter a powerful secret at odds with the fundamental nature of the target creatures.

spells.name: Tempest Touch
spells.summary: Your touch calls forth a churning mass of icy water that clings to your target, dealing 1d4 bludgeoning damage and 1d4 cold damage.

spells.name: Thunderburst
spells.summary: You create a powerful blast of air and a loud peal of thunder, dealing 2d6 bludgeoning damage and 2d6 sonic damage.

spells.name: Tempest Form
spells.summary: Your body becomes fluid.

spells.name: Tentacular Limbs
spells.summary: Your arms turn into long, pliable tentacles, increasing your reach when you're delivering touch range spells and making unarmed Strikes with your arms (such as fist and claw Strikes) to 10 feet.

spells.name: Aberrant Whispers
spells.summary: You utter phrases in an unknown tongue, assaulting the minds of those nearby.

spells.name: Unusual Anatomy
spells.summary: You transform your flesh and organs into a bizarre amalgam of glistening skin, rough scales, tufts of hair, and tumorous protuberances.

spells.name: Angelic Halo
spells.summary: You gain an angelic halo with an aura that increases allies' healing from the heal spell.

spells.name: Angelic Wings
spells.summary: Wings of pure light spread out from your back, granting you a fly Speed equal to your Speed.

spells.name: Celestial Brand
spells.summary: A blazing symbol appears on the target, cursing it to face divine justice.

spells.name: Glutton's Jaws
spells.summary: A slavering maw opens beneath a target and tries to take a bite out of them.

spells.name: Swamp of Sloth
spells.summary: Ground in the area turns swampy and fetid.

spells.name: Chthonian Wrath
spells.summary: You evoke the energy of a part of the Outer Rifts.

spells.name: Diabolic Edict
spells.summary: You issue a diabolic edict, demanding the target perform a particular task and offering rewards for its fulfillment.

spells.name: Embrace the Pit
spells.summary: Devil horns grow from your skull, and your skin takes on features of the devil responsible for your diabolic bloodline.

spells.name: Hellfire Plume
spells.summary: You call forth a plume of hellfire that erupts from below

spells.name: Flurry of Claws
spells.summary: Vicious dragon claws appear and slash at two nearby foes.

spells.name: Dragon Breath
spells.summary: You spew energy from your mouth, dealing 5d6 damage with a basic Reflex save.

spells.name: Dragon Wings
spells.summary: Leathery wings sprout from your back, giving you a fly Speed of 60 feet or your Speed, whichever is faster.

spells.name: Elemental Toss
spells.summary: With a flick of your wrist, you fling a chunk of your elemental matter at your foe.

spells.name: Elemental Motion
spells.summary: You call upon your element to propel you, improving your Speed depending on your element.

spells.name: Elemental Blast
spells.summary: You gather elemental energy and blast your foes in one of the various listed shapes of your choosing, dealing 8d6 damage.

spells.name: Faerie Dust
spells.summary: You sprinkle magical dust in the spell's area, making those within easier to trick.

spells.name: Fey Disappearance
spells.summary: You become invisible and ignore natural difficult terrain (such as underbrush).

spells.name: Fey Glamour
spells.summary: You call upon fey glamours to cloak an area or the targets in illusion.

spells.name: Jealous Hex
spells.summary: You draw forth a hag's innate jealousy to deny a target its greatest attribute.

spells.name: Horrific Visage
spells.summary: You briefly transform your features into the horrific visage of a hag, striking fear into your enemies.

spells.name: You're Mine
spells.summary: You manipulate the target's emotions, potentially allowing you to control it for a brief instant.

spells.name: Ancestral Memories
spells.summary: The memories of long-dead spellcasters grant you their knowledge, making your spells more formidable.

spells.name: Extend Blood Magic
spells.summary: You call upon the arcane energy coursing through your blood to extend the magic it grants.

spells.name: Arcane Countermeasure
spells.summary: You undermine the target spell, making it easier to defend against.

spells.name: Undeath's Blessing
spells.summary: You instill within a creature the touch of the grave.

spells.name: Drain Life
spells.summary: You close your hand and pull life energy from another creature into yourself.

spells.name: Grasping Grave
spells.summary: Hundreds of skeletal arms erupt from the ground in the area, clawing at creatures within and attempting to hold them in place.

spells.name: Bone Flense
spells.summary: The target weapon becomes imbued with Achaekek’s power

spells.name: Crimson Breath
spells.summary: You turn a creature toward you and exhale a blast of crimson mist from your mouth

spells.name: Mantis's Grasp
spells.summary: You cause red, ghostly mantis arms to sprout from a nearby surface.

spells.name: Mark of Blood
spells.summary: You place a drop of your blood on a weapon and charge it with magic

spells.name: Sawtooth Terrain
spells.summary: You cause long, serrated mantis limbs to appear.

spells.name: Achaekek's Clutch
spells.summary: You mark the holy symbol of Achaekek in a visible location on the target’s body.

spells.name: Mantis Form
spells.summary: You become a mantis.

spells.name: Debilitating Terror
spells.summary: You fill the target’s mind with terrifying images to disrupt their combat focus.

spells.name: Shroud of the Mantis
spells.summary: You wrap yourself in a crimson cloak that renders you invisible.

spells.name: Luminous Stardust Healing
spells.summary: You scatter twinkling sparks from your sentinel weapon, replenishing your allies’ fighting spirit and driving out evil.

spells.name: Shining Starlight Attack
spells.summary: You brandish your sentinel weapon, summoning the image of your constellation above your head.

spells.name: Home Among Mulberry Leaves
spells.summary: Qi-formed threads unravel from your fabric on conjured needles as your attack makes contact with an enemy and wraps it in place like an insect in its cocoon.

spells.name: Sky Laughs at Waves
spells.summary: You soar and leave the world’s squabbles behind before your violent intentions ground you once more.

spells.name: Traveling Workshop
spells.summary: Your apparition guides you through complex procedures while using your magic to provide you with whatever tools you need.

spells.name: Store Time
spells.summary: You store time for later use.

spells.name: Discomfiting Whisper
spells.summary: You are surrounded by an aura of spiteful murmurings that incite bad luck and punish failure.

spells.name: Devouring Dark Form
spells.summary: Your apparition's dark power blends with your physical body, allowing you to take on terrifying characteristics of creatures that lurk in dark places.

spells.name: Nymph's Grace
spells.summary: Your apparition manifests as a mask of unearthly beauty that bewilders your enemies.

spells.name: Trickster's Mirrors
spells.summary: You are surrounded by up to 3 mirrors that reflect twisted and distorted images of you, making it hard to tell where you actually are within your space and potentially causing those who attack you to hit one of the mirrors instead.

spells.name: Darkened Forest Form
spells.summary: Your apparition casts a feral shadow over your form.

spells.name: Earth's Bile
spells.summary: Your apparition is the will of lava and magma made manifest, the earth's molten blood unleashing devastating bursts of liquid stone and unquenchable fire at your command.

spells.name: River Carving Mountains
spells.summary: Your apparition solidifies around you into roaring water and spraying mist.

spells.name: Embodiment of Battle
spells.summary: Your apparition guides your attacks and imparts its skill to your movements.

spells.name: Manifest Will
spells.summary: You unleash energy from the broken connection to your patron.

spells.name: Vindicator's Mark
spells.summary: You launch a magical dart at your hunted prey, which marks them with a nimbus only you can detect.

spells.name: Vindicator's Judgement
spells.summary: You pronounce a terrible judgment upon your quarry that causes all of your attacks and divine spells to strike with deadly efficacy.

spells.name: Garden of Healing
spells.summary: Spirits of comfort and respite swirl around you, trailing visions of growing grass and blooming blossoms.

spells.name: Pocket Library
spells.summary: Like Vil Seral, you collect information from all around you and store it in book form in an extradimensional library

spells.name: Grasping Vine
spells.summary: A thick, curling vine erupts from the ground beneath you and stretches to the target, allowing you to move it around.

spells.name: Unsettling Knowledge
spells.summary: You share a piece of hidden knowledge with a creature that is both upsetting and intriguing.

spells.name: Bridge of Vines
spells.summary: Vines sprout beneath your feet and extend away from you in a straight line.

spells.name: Mental Map
spells.summary: You glean detailed information about a specific place visited by a creature directly from its mind.

spells.name: Overwhelming Memory
spells.summary: You cause the target to recall a specific type of memory.

spells.name: Restore Ground
spells.summary: You sense that this place yearns to throw off the shackles of civilization.

spells.name: Mimic Spell
spells.summary: You learn the secrets of a spell just by watching someone else cast it.

spells.name: Recall Legacy
spells.summary: You establish a mental link with the target, focusing on a piece of knowledge important to their culture, family (by birth or choice), or home settlement.

spells.name: Information Overload
spells.summary: You call on Cobyslarni to open the target’s mind to knowledge—too much knowledge

spells.name: Unravel Knowledge
spells.summary: Your patron reaches into the target’s mind, plucking out their past training like pulling a thread from a cloth.

spells.name: Censure Falsehoods
spells.summary: You call on your patron to reprimand a creature that has attempted a Deception or Stealth check against you.

spells.name: Halcyon Mists
spells.summary: In a moment of dire need, you call upon ancestral power to strengthen and sustain.

spells.name: Call the Ten
spells.summary: The Ten Magic Warriors were the first of the Magaambya’s students, and they come to your aid even now.

spells.name: Domora's Defense
spells.summary: When you Cast this Spell, a watery replica of the eidolon Dyzad appears in front of each of the targets.

spells.name: The Four Hunters
spells.summary: This is a story of four evenly matched hunters who sought to capture a falling star.

spells.name: Ibex's Harvest
spells.summary: In the tale “Ibex’s Harvest,” Ibex turns from the path of a warrior to the path of a farmer, building up their community by working hard and sharing a bountiful harvest not just with their humanoid neighbors but also with their animal neighbors.

spells.name: Kgalaserke's Axes
spells.summary: The folklore and tales surrounding the legendary hero Kgalaserke are so widespread and well known that a hundred lifetimes would not be enough to have accomplished everything she is reputed to have done.

spells.name: The Parrot's Whisper
spells.summary: You call forth an echo of the gossiping parrot from the tale of the Witch and the Weave.

spells.name: Ranage's Circle
spells.summary: Many stories tell of a clearing deep in the Mwangi jungle, surrounded by ancient cypress trees

spells.name: Turbulent Tide
spells.summary: You cause the sheath of water and the improvised weapon it surrounds to surge outward with stupendous force as you attack.

spells.name: Threefold Limb
spells.summary: You temporarily transform one of your limbs into water, taking the form of ice, liquid water, or steam as you desire.

spells.name: Unbroken Panoply
spells.summary: As tools of violence undone by violence, broken weapons contain potent symbolic magic that faydhaans often call upon when forming alliances.

spells.name: Beseech the Sphinx
spells.summary: You look to the great Sphinx constellation, wisest of all cosmic guides and favored of Phimater, asking them to lend their insight to the target.

spells.name: Buzzing Servants
spells.summary: You summon a swarm of bees from the city of Axis that rapidly constructs geometric shapes from wax.

spells.name: Coiling Dance
spells.summary: You perform a dance that seeks to pass on the knowledge and wisdom of a naga.

spells.name: Disruptive Transfer
spells.summary: Using Venorium Blorm’s formulas, you calculate a path through space.

spells.name: All-Encompassing Hunger
spells.summary: You reach out to devour a life, regardless of whether you need it for sustenance.

spells.name: Crescent Scepter
spells.summary: You hold up any object, which takes on the appearance of glowing regalia in the eyes of those who look on you.

spells.name: Cutting Eye
spells.summary: Your eyes open enviously, stealing the power of an opponent for yourself.

spells.name: Heart's Hook
spells.summary: You drive two creatures toward a fated meeting

spells.name: Precious Gleam
spells.summary: You temporarily enhance a weapon, replacing it with finer materials.

spells.name: Reclined Apport
spells.summary: Walking over to an item to pick it up is so much effort.

spells.name: Vengeful Glare
spells.summary: Your gaze falls on a creature, filled with icy vengeance or fiery wrath

spells.name: Personal Runewell
spells.summary: The runelords of Thassilon pioneered the creation of runewells, magical artifacts that could extract and store the power of sin magic from mortal souls.

spells.name: Chrysopoetic Curse
spells.summary: You grant the target the gift of riches, giving them the power to turn anything they touch to gold

spells.name: Devouring Void
spells.summary: Countless tears in space appear in the area, like hungry mouths.

spells.name: Indolent Haze
spells.summary: The faint scent of poppies and a soothing calm fill the area, urging creatures to lay down and take a rest.

spells.name: Love's Sacrifice
spells.summary: You cry out for aid, and a creature near you feels compelled to throw itself in front of the threat as the ultimate expression of their love.

spells.name: Thief of Fortune
spells.summary: Seeing another creature improve themself with magic, you reach out and seize its benefits for yourself.

spells.name: The Queen's Rainbow
spells.summary: You tell the story of the Queen of Bees and her retinue trying to pass through a rainbow on their way to visit the King of Spiders.

spells.name: Annunciation of the Outer Gate
spells.summary: You announce yourself in the name of certain grim pacts that predate mortal life.

spells.name: 500 Toads
spells.summary: You conjure hundreds of magical toads to fill the area and hop around.

spells.name: Burglar's Blind
spells.summary: The only thing thieves love more than being silent and stealthy is the piles of gold they win with that silence and stealth.

spells.name: Far-Flung Fetch
spells.summary: You can pilfer an object even if it's outside the reach of your fingers.

spells.name: Infiltrator's Tunnel
spells.summary: It's best to know the ingress and egress points for any location you plan to rob.

spells.name: Acid Storm
spells.summary: You evoke a storm of acid rain that pelts the area for the spell’s duration.

spells.name: Acidic Burst
spells.summary: You create a shell of acid around yourself that immediately bursts outward

spells.name: Agitate
spells.summary: You send the target’s mind and body into overdrive, forcing it to become restless and hyperactive.

spells.name: Animus Mine
spells.summary: You implant a mental mine within your psyche that detonates against anyone attempting to magically manipulate your thoughts.

spells.name: Anticipate Peril
spells.summary: You grant the target brief foresight.

spells.name: Befuddle
spells.summary: You sow seeds of confusion in your target’s mind.

spells.name: Benediction
spells.summary: Divine protection helps protect your companions.

spells.name: Cloak of Light
spells.summary: You surround yourself in holy light that restores the living and rebuffs undead.

spells.name: Cup of Dust
spells.summary: You curse the target with a thirst no drink can quench.

spells.name: Endure
spells.summary: You invigorate the touched creature’s mind and urge it to press on.

spells.name: Expeditious Excavation
spells.summary: You remove loose dirt, dust, gravel, sand, and the like (though not solid stone) up to the size of a 5-foot cube.

spells.name: Fear the Sun
spells.summary: You cause the creature’s vision to become particularly sensitive.

spells.name: Feast of Ashes
spells.summary: You curse the target with a hunger no food can sate.

spells.name: Fungal Hyphae
spells.summary: Thin hyphae grow from your feet and plunge into the earth, creating a symbiotic fungal network that attaches to plants within 30 feet and connects you to their root systems.

spells.name: Glamorize
spells.summary: Using simple magical gestures, you alter a minor detail of your appearance.

spells.name: Liberating Command
spells.summary: You call out a liberating cry, urging an ally to break free of an effect that holds them in place.

spells.name: Malediction
spells.summary: You incite distress in the minds of your enemies, making it more difficult for them to defend themselves.

spells.name: Message Rune
spells.summary: You record a message up to 5 minutes long and inscribe a special rune on any flat unattended surface or small object within reach.

spells.name: Moonburst
spells.summary: A powerful globe of chilling moonlight explodes in the area, dealing 8d10 cold damage to all creatures in the area, plus an additional 8d10 vitality damage to undead creatures.

spells.name: Moonlight Ray
spells.summary: You unleash a holy beam of freezing moonlight.

spells.name: Penumbral Disguise
spells.summary: You wrap the target in shadows, granting it a +1 status bonus to Stealth checks to Hide while in dim light or darkness.

spells.name: Penumbral Shroud
spells.summary: You envelop the target in a shroud of shadow.

spells.name: Radiant Field
spells.summary: You create an area of bright light.

spells.name: Reflective Scales
spells.summary: You grow a set of colored, glowing scales or scaled armor that stores energy before releasing it in a final burst.

spells.name: Share Lore
spells.summary: You share your knowledge with the touched creatures.

spells.name: Shattering Gem
spells.summary: A large gem floats around the target in an erratic pattern.

spells.name: Shifting Sand
spells.summary: You cause the surface to heave.

spells.name: Shockwave
spells.summary: You create a wave of energy that ripples through the earth.

spells.name: Show The Way
spells.summary: You and allies in the area gain preternatural knowledge of the path ahead, allowing you to intuit the best way forward and avoid potential obstacles, such as difficult or confusing terrain.

spells.name: Slough Skin
spells.summary: You continually and harmlessly slough off the top layer of your skin while new skin regenerates immediately, quickly moving damaging substances away from your body.

spells.name: Temporary Tool
spells.summary: You conjure a temporary simple tool, such as a shovel or rope into your hands.

spells.name: Tether
spells.summary: You use magical chains, vines, or other tethers to bind your target to you.

spells.name: Wall of Radiance
spells.summary: You create a thin wall of brilliant light in a straight line up to 60 feet long and 10 feet high.

spells.name: Wall of Shadow
spells.summary: You form a wall of pure darkness in a straight line up to 60 feet long and 10 feet high.

spells.name: Whirling Scarves
spells.summary: You surround yourself in a vortex of whirling colorful scarves of force that obfuscate you and disorient your foes.

spells.name: Lift Nature's Caul
spells.summary: With a wave of the hand, you cause all creatures in the area to see the world around them as if a gauzy film had been lifted away to expose the truth that lies below their perceived reality.

spells.name: Fearful Feast
spells.summary: You open your mouth wide and inhale sharply; you draw in the bravery, self-confidence, and hope to which the frightened target clings and then strip away the target’s false assumption that these fragile emotions can save them from the oblivion of terror.

spells.name: Adapt Self
spells.summary: You make subtle changes to your body to adapt to the situation.

spells.name: Adaptive Ablation
spells.summary: You shift yourself to adapt to the mystical wavelengths of the energy damage, protecting yourself from further harm.

spells.name: Winter Bolt
spells.summary: You fling a hollow icicle filled with winter’s wrath.

spells.name: Diamond Dust
spells.summary: You supercool the nearby air, forming a cloud of dancing ice crystals in an emanation around you.

spells.name: Withering Grasp
spells.summary: Your touch rots organic material and decays objects.

spells.name: Fallow Field
spells.summary: A sickly yellow light fills the area as entropic forces prevent healing.

spells.name: Clouded Focus
spells.summary: You sharpen a creature’s senses, though more distant objects become hazy, indistinct, or muted to it.

spells.name: Ephemeral Hazards
spells.summary: You create illusory hazards, such as spinning blades or a puddle of acid, in four 10-foot-by–10-foot spaces within range.

spells.name: Draconic Barrage
spells.summary: You shape energy into a small group of tiny dragons (or other serpentine creatures) that flit around you.

spells.name: Roar of the Dragon
spells.summary: You channel the might of dragons into your voice, letting out a roar that engenders respect in dragonkind but that instills fear in most other creatures.

spells.name: Parch
spells.summary: Dry winds dehydrate a creature.

spells.name: Dust Storm
spells.summary: You call forth a swirling storm of dust.

spells.name: Swear Oath
spells.summary: You loudly and firmly state a course of action that you swear to fulfill.

spells.name: Dutiful Challenge
spells.summary: As you challenge an enemy, you take some of its attention away from your allies.

spells.name: Redact
spells.summary: You strike mention of a specific name from one or more documents.

spells.name: Ghostly Transcription
spells.summary: Glowing letters assemble in the air, providing a transcription of the target’s speech in all languages you speak.

spells.name: Guided Introspection
spells.summary: You guide the target in examining their innermost feelings, their behaviors, and the motivations behind their actions, granting them clarity and insight.

spells.name: Confront Selves
spells.summary: You show the target the spiraling web of actions and consequences that is their life and the changes wrought by these decisions upon themselves and those around them.

spells.name: Charged Javelin
spells.summary: You fire a javelin of electricity that leaves a charged field around its target.

spells.name: Bottle the Storm
spells.summary: When lightning is turned against you, you store the charge safely within yourself, unleashing it when the time is right.

spells.name: Serrate
spells.summary: With a pinch, the metal of a weapon twists, adding numerous jagged blades along its surface.

spells.name: Repel Metal
spells.summary: You call forth a repelling field.

spells.name: Chastising Retort
spells.summary: You unleash some choice words empowered with divine might.

spells.name: Show the Path
spells.summary: You grant the target insight on things to come, guiding them toward a fate they find most fitting and encouraging them to continue this journey.

spells.name: Empty Inside
spells.summary: You inject a sliver of the void into your mind, momentarily remaking it into a bleak and empty place.

spells.name: Door to Beyond
spells.summary: Striking at thin air, you create hairline cracks in an unoccupied adjacent space that lead somewhere outside reality.

spells.name: Divine Plagues
spells.summary: Your deity sends wracking plagues.

spells.name: Foul Miasma
spells.summary: You multiply the disease within a creature, drawing it into an infectious mist outside their body where it can spread to other creatures.

spells.name: Share Burden
spells.summary: You shoulder some of your ally’s pain.

spells.name: Font of Serenity
spells.summary: A divine beacon radiates serenity, soothing nearby allies.

spells.name: Lament
spells.summary: You let out your negative emotions in a guttural wail that shakes your enemies’ hearts and deals 1d8 mental damage (basic Will save) to each creature in the area.

spells.name: Overflowing Sorrow
spells.summary: Sadness flows out of you into nearby creatures, blotting out any other thoughts they had.

spells.name: Eject Soul
spells.summary: Your touch disrupts the connection between body and soul, possibly forcing the soul out of the body altogether.

spells.name: Ectoplasmic Interstice
spells.summary: You force the mortal Universe and Ethereal Planes to partially merge, creating a zone that causes incorporeal and spiritual entities to take on many of the aspects of corporeal creatures.

spells.name: Zenith Star
spells.summary: You call a tiny star to orbit a creature in a sparkling halo before shooting up into the heavens, where it marks the creature’s rough location.

spells.name: Asterism
spells.summary: Lines of burning starlight form a constellation around you.

spells.name: Swarmsense
spells.summary: You extend your senses through a multitude of crawling and flying creatures.

spells.name: Swarm Form
spells.summary: You discorporate into a swarm of Tiny creatures.

spells.name: Delay Consequence
spells.summary: You transpose the moment that the target would be injured to a point later in its timestream.

spells.name: Stasis
spells.summary: The flow of time congeals around an object or creature, holding it in place.

spells.name: Practice Makes Perfect
spells.summary: The target gains a +2 status bonus to the triggering check, or a +3 bonus if the target has master or better proficiency in the skill.

spells.name: Tireless Worker
spells.summary: You suppress your choice of one of the following conditions that’s affecting the target: clumsy, encumbered, enfeebled, or fatigued.

spells.name: Object Memory
spells.summary: By touching an object, you draw forth the experience of those who created and used it.

spells.name: Remember the Lost
spells.summary: You call upon the lost and forgotten, assailing your foes’ minds with the memories of those who died with a grievance toward them.

spells.name: Arms Of Nature
spells.summary: All wood, dead or alive, is your armory.

spells.name: Wood Walk
spells.summary: Wood shapes itself according to your will readily, making staircases appear as you climb up the side of a tree, automatically weaving vines into ladders, or lowering branches to lift you up to the top.

spells.name: Ashen Wind
spells.summary: You conjure a swirling wind of ashes that blows through the area.

spells.name: Incendiary Ashes
spells.summary: A cloud of magical ashes descends upon creatures in the area.

spells.name: Ash Form
spells.summary: You take the form of a cloud of minuscule ash particles.

spells.name: Ulcerous Canker
spells.summary: Weeping sores open on the target as you expose it to decay, dealing 1d4 void damage and 1d4 poison damage plus 1 persistent bleed damage.

spells.name: Purging Toxins
spells.summary: In the right dose, a scourge can become a cure.

spells.name: Accelerated Decomposition
spells.summary: You speed the natural process of a creature’s decline and debilitation.

spells.name: Entreat Spirit
spells.summary: You invite a spirit you’ve bonded with to bolster your mind.

spells.name: Entreat the Many
spells.summary: You manifest echoes of all the spirits you’ve ever bonded with at once, in a spiraling cyclone of colorful forms.

spells.name: Share Vision
spells.summary: Your patron temporarily links your vision with that of another, causing both of you to be able to see through each other’s eyes.

spells.name: Trade Death for Life
spells.summary: Your patron steals life from one of your enemies to grant it to another.

spells.name: Spirit Object
spells.summary: Using a sliver of Baba Yaga’s power, you briefly bring a nearby object to life.

spells.name: Buzzing Bites
spells.summary: You evoke buzzing and crawling insects to climb onto a foe’s body and bite, dealing 1d4 piercing damage and potentially sickening the foe, depending on its Fortitude save.

spells.name: Bee-Man's Summons
spells.summary: You recreate the Bee-Man’s infamous ability to sense when someone utters their name.

spells.name: Fungal Exhalation
spells.summary: You exhale toxic mold spores that fill the area.

spells.name: Hedge Prison
spells.summary: You conjure an intricate hedge prison to trap a creature, encasing them completely in a hollow cube of dense bushes.

spells.name: Mushroom Patch
spells.summary: You cause mushrooms to sprout in the area.

spells.name: Boomerang Shot
spells.summary: You launch a curved length of wood at a foe that arcs around objects and obstacles to strike from an unexpected direction.

spells.name: Bramble Bush
spells.summary: In a sudden burst of growth, you cause a thorned bush to sprout from the ground, lash around, and wither.

spells.name: Conjured Conveyance
spells.summary: You conjure an intricate vehicle, carved entirely from wood, to serve as a method of conveyance.

spells.name: Cordyceps Command
spells.summary: You conjure a mote of cordyceps spores uniquely tailored to the target before whisking it at them.

spells.name: Reed Whistle
spells.summary: You enchant a blade of grass that you can easily hold in your mouth without inhibiting your speech or other actions.

spells.name: Reflected Beauty
spells.summary: When you cast reflected beauty, choose a willing creature that’s the same size as you and that you can see within 30 feet.

spells.name: Missed Cue
spells.summary: You make the spell’s target believe they had something incredibly important to say but forgot to say it, and now they’ve missed their opportunity.

spells.name: Musical Shift
spells.summary: With a quick series of wrist flicks, music fills the air.

spells.name: Take Your Places
spells.summary: The scene would play out exactly as you envisioned it, if only the actors would respect their blocking.

spells.name: Vibrant Vibrato
spells.summary: Your voice trills in perfect vibrato.

spells.name: Ancestral Winds
spells.summary: You call on the same energies that manifest ancestor storms, summoning wailing spirits to terrorize your foes.

spells.name: Mutilate
spells.summary: You cut your own body in a ritualistic manner, causing similar damage to a creature in your line of sight.

spells.name: Strength of Mind
spells.summary: You bolster your ally with reminders of their physical prowess, granting them additional defenses against harmful mental effects.

spells.name: Utter Destruction
spells.summary: You screech with an unearthly voice made of destructive energy, smashing everything that lies before you.

spells.name: Tanglecurse
spells.summary: Tanglebriar has been called a “curse on the land,” which has inspired Treerazer’s cult to develop this notorious spell.

spells.name: Ray of Corruption
spells.summary: You unleash a sickly gray beam of toxic spores at your target.

spells.name: Dimensional Excision
spells.summary: You manipulate the boundaries between planes like a scalpel, using it to cut away portions of a creature’s essence and banishing those portions to other realities and dimensions, afflicting the target deep lacerations or even severed appendages.

spells.name: Trim the Blight
spells.summary: You create a cone of shimmering energy that attempts to banish the influence of invasive, supernatural blight, such as that found in Tanglebriar.

spells.name: Avenging Wildwood
spells.summary: Medium tree sprouts in an unoccupied square within range, its branches capable of striking out at your foes.

spells.name: Eagle's Cry
spells.summary: You let out the mighty cry of a majestic eagle that pierces eardrums.

spells.name: Equal Footing
spells.summary: You level the field between yourself and another creature, hampering its movements if it’s quicker than you.

spells.name: Radiant Globe
spells.summary: You create a dome of brilliant light that destroys projectiles attempting to pass through it.

spells.name: Unexpected Windfall
spells.summary: Coins, trinkets carved from heavy stone, and other cumbersome treasures rain down upon a foe.

spells.name: Capital Dividend
spells.summary: Through diet and other strict regimens, you’ve fortified your body as Kalistrade’s teachings have fortified your mind.

spells.name: Attacked From Within
spells.summary: You assert your power over the target’s own spirit as you reach deep into its soul in order to discover a moment of excruciating anguish, debilitating humiliation, or abject despair.

spells.name: Defended By Spirits
spells.summary: You entreat a spirit or the spiritual energies in your location to surround and protect an ally from an certain foe.

spells.name: Manifestation Of Spirits
spells.summary: You open the target’s eyes to the plethora of spirits surrounding it—and it sees all these spirits as menacing and powerful.

spells.name: Pain Of Ages
spells.summary: You sense a spiritual resonance of deep anguish in the earth beneath your feet, the walls surrounding you, or the fragments of souls left behind in a place of calamity.

spells.name: Spirit Ward
spells.summary: You draw on nearby spiritual energy or on echoes of the spirits you’ve invoked throughout your life to temporarily ward living flesh against dangerous spirits.

spells.name: Spiritual Renewal
spells.summary: You draw upon the restorative power of the spirits around you.

spells.name: Spiritual Transport
spells.summary: You call upon the spiritual energies surrounding you to teleport you to an unoccupied space within range that you can see.

spells.name: Veil Of Spirits
spells.summary: You draw on the essence of spiritual energy surrounding you to manifest a misty veil.

spells.name: Menacing Lament
spells.summary: You wail a dirge for your enemies.

spells.name: Valiant Anthem
spells.summary: You chant a rallying cry to bolster your allies.

spells.name: Elemental Sheath
spells.summary: You coat yourself in nature’s power.

spells.name: Vicious Howl
spells.summary: You howl with passion for your cause, empowering yourself to push beyond your limits.

spells.name: Friendly Push
spells.summary: You exert magical force to propel a willing creature up to 10 feet in a straight line, including upward, though if they aren’t on solid ground or have another way to maintain their height (such as a fly Speed) when the movement ends, they fall.

spells.name: Rapid Retreat
spells.summary: You know how to swiftly escape from harm.

spells.name: Echo Jump
spells.summary: You teleport to an unoccupied space within range, leaving behind a faint echo of your form that explodes with magical force.

spells.name: Forest of Gates
spells.summary: You transport yourself and your allies to a peaceful extraplanar realm of towering trees, each of which holds a misty gateway to another location.

spells.name: King's Castle
spells.summary: You and a willing creature swap places.

spells.name: Sudden Transposition
spells.summary: You wrench the targets off their feet, forcefully teleporting them within the area.

spells.name: Trade Items
spells.summary: You magically swap an item you’re holding for another that someone else has.

spells.name: Warping Pull
spells.summary: You get an ally out of danger with a teleporting pull.

spells.name: Conjured Clockwork
spells.summary: You conjure a complex clockwork device on the ground and cause it to slowly spread across the battlefield.

spells.name: Augmented Body
spells.summary: You magically augment your body with clockwork parts and magitech innovations.

spells.name: Shielding Formation
spells.summary: You conjure magical shields of force to protect your allies around you.

spells.name: Barbed Spear
spells.summary: You conjure a vicious barbed spear and hurl it at a foe.

spells.name: Wings of the Valkyrie
spells.summary: Powerful feathered wings—usually vibrant white or jet black— emerge from your back, granting you a fly Speed equal to your Speed.

spells.name: Let not the Fallen Rest
spells.summary: You exhort your fallen comrades to return to the battle.

spells.name: Blinding Bottle
spells.summary: You conjure an exploding glass container filled with a sightstealing poison and hurl it across enemy lines.

spells.name: Blister Bomb
spells.summary: You launch a small bomb enchanted with a fast-acting skin disease at your foes, causing their skin to break out in horrible bleeding sores.

spells.name: Boots on the Ground
spells.summary: You craft the illusion of your army being much bigger than it actually is, hoping to overwhelm the opposing forces and shatter their hopes.

spells.name: Clockwork Devotion
spells.summary: You toss a handful of magical cogs before you, summoning a battalion of clockwork soldiers to fight your enemies.

spells.name: Conquering Soldiers
spells.summary: You tap into the glories of the armies of old, bringing forth their might to your battlefield and making their strength and power your own.

spells.name: Curse of Recoil
spells.summary: You curse an enemy to suffer a kickback as they make a ranged attack, potentially causing them to miss.

spells.name: Dancing Shield
spells.summary: You levitate the touched shield and send it to orbit around a creature.

spells.name: Desperate Repair
spells.summary: You hold a shield together with the power of your magic, forcing wood and steel to fuse back together.

spells.name: Dividing Trench
spells.summary: You dig an earthen trench across the surrounding terrain, which must be soil, clay, sand, or other soft earth, but not flooring or stone.

spells.name: Explosive Barrage
spells.summary: You fire a booming, fiery explosion followed by a salvo of smaller blasts, each cracking the air with the sound of thunder.

spells.name: Fallen Soldier's Lament
spells.summary: You raise an illusion in the space of a fallen foe, crafting it to resemble a ghost of your target before parading it across the battlefield.

spells.name: Filter Air
spells.summary: You suck in a rough breath of air, and your body automatically filters out the harmful molecules that would infest your lungs.

spells.name: Forced Mercy
spells.summary: You soften the target’s blows, ensuring they avoid vital areas and cause no lasting harm.

spells.name: Frozen Fog
spells.summary: You conjure a chilling mist that settles into the bones and makes it difficult to move.

spells.name: Helpful Reload
spells.summary: With a quick gesture, you reload your ally’s weapon, allowing them to focus on fighting the enemy.

spells.name: Holy Host
spells.summary: In stories, armies with just and righteous causes win with little difficulty, conquering unholy legions.

spells.name: Instant Minefield
spells.summary: You create several hidden mines throughout the area that explode when stepped on.

spells.name: Jassim's Allegiance
spells.summary: You bartered for this spell in some strange market or perhaps gained it while wandering the desert, hopelessly lost and surrounded by nothing but the remnants of time and fallen empires.

spells.name: Lock Item
spells.summary: One object held by a creature becomes fused to that creature’s hand and can’t be put down.

spells.name: Pest Swarm
spells.summary: Sometimes the most common irritations can band together and become threats to your enemies.

spells.name: Shock and Awe
spells.summary: You create the illusion of cannons exploding, bullets and arrows flying, and magical ballistics firing, as an overwhelming torrent of information, both visual and auditory.

spells.name: Siege Weapon's Blessing
spells.summary: You trace a magic rune onto the body of a siege weapon, calling upon fate or your faith to guide the attacks your allies make with this machine.

spells.name: Skeleton Army
spells.summary: With a fistful of compressed bones, you summon a legion of skeletal hulks to fight in your war, refusing to let them rest until they’ve given up their last inches of usefulness to your cause.

spells.name: Steel Fortifications
spells.summary: You conjure several metal structures that consist of angled beams attached to one another at a central point, which can help block attacks.

spells.name: Sticky Fire
spells.summary: You send a bubble of viscous liquid that sparks into flame.

spells.name: Unholy Army
spells.summary: Reaching out to the legions of the wicked, you call upon them for assistance.

spells.name: Funeral Flames
spells.summary: You transform a bludgeon into a fearsome torch suited to casting undead into the afterlife.

spells.name: Pyrefowl Rebuke
spells.summary: Fiery wings briefly envelop your arms, and with a swift wingbeat, you flutter away from your attacker in a shower of searing sparks.

spells.name: Crown of Prophets
spells.summary: Serpents sprout from your head, equally ready to bite your foes or offer you counsel.

spells.name: Gift of the Anemos
spells.summary: Your apparition envelops you in gusting winds that can speed your steps or buffet your foes.

spells.name: Armor of Thorn and Claw
spells.summary: Razor-sharp thorns and claws erupt from your skin or scales.

spells.name: Blood-Feasting Breath
spells.summary: Like a vorpal dragon, you absorb life with an inhale and release it with an exhale.

spells.name: Channel Arrogance
spells.summary: You channel your heightened sense of self-worth into a creature, forcing them to acknowledge your true worth.

spells.name: Cloud Current
spells.summary: Air and water vapor combine into a great cloud that funnels a powerful current within it.

spells.name: Divine Dragon's Watch
spells.summary: You summon an invisible divine draconic spirit to watch over your target.

spells.name: Dragon Turret
spells.summary: You conjure forth a massive tower with a large dragon that’s bound to crawl its length.

spells.name: Earth and Sky
spells.summary: You erupt into the air with the force of a dragon taking flight, launching nearby creatures into the sky with you.

spells.name: Horde of Underlings
spells.summary: You summon six underlings, such as skeletons or kobolds.

spells.name: Orb of Twisting Fate
spells.summary: The glass orb of an omen dragon erupts from your target’s forehead, overwhelming their mind with alternative options.

spells.name: Lashunta's Life Bubble
spells.summary: You create a replenishing protective bubble of fresh, temperate air around the target.

spells.name: Advanced Scurvy
spells.summary: Your touch afflicts the target with an advanced form of scurvy, a mariner’s disease stemming from improper nutrition.

spells.name: Briny Bolt
spells.summary: You hurl a bolt of salt water from your extended hand.

spells.name: Lashing Rope
spells.summary: You cause a section of rope or a rope-like object to animate, slither to your square, and encircle you, wreathing you in twisting, lashing fibers.

spells.name: Cycle of Retribution
spells.summary: An understanding of how violence begets more violence fills your target, causing it mental anguish in the form of splitting headaches when it attempts to take violent actions.

spells.name: Fateful Condemnation
spells.summary: You draw upon the target’s negative fate, causing this lingering destiny to afflict it and its nearby allies with the unintended consequences of its past lives.

spells.name: Fated Healing
spells.summary: You speak about the consequences of actions people take against each other and how it’s possible to break cycles of violence simply by making a different choice.

spells.name: Life's Flowing River
spells.summary: You create a flowing river of ghostly water and that sheds dim light for 10 feet on each side.

spells.name: Entangle Fate
spells.summary: You cause a swirl of energy to entangle the fates of all caught within the blast.

spells.name: Life's Fresh Bloom
spells.summary: The ground around you blooms with life, sprouting sparkling grass, flowers, and small shrubs.

spells.name: Prophet's Luck
spells.summary: You prophesize the result of the triggering saving throw as either a success (including a critical success) or a failure (including a critical failure).

spells.name: Sacred Nimbus
spells.summary: You summon a small, fluffy white nimbus cloud that floats 10 feet above the ground and rains down pleasantly warm sanctified water.

spells.name: Tomorrow's Dawn
spells.summary: The golden light of a new dawn and the promise of life beyond death radiates from your body.

spells.name: Wall of Mirrors
spells.summary: You create a solid wall of shimmering reflective glass up to 50 feet long and 20 feet high.

spells.name: Telekinetic Rend
spells.summary: Your mind creates a violent axis of motion in a nearby space that can smash or sever at your will.

spells.name: Vector Screen
spells.summary: You set up a transparent, rippling screen of telekinetic energy that seizes small, fast-moving projectiles

spells.name: Dancing Blade
spells.summary: You telekinetically animate a weapon that’s unattended or on your person.

spells.name: Glimpse Weakness
spells.summary: You glimpse a loose scale, a seam in a foe's armor, or a similar weakness, aiding your allies in landing a precise hit.

spells.name: Omnidirectional Scan
spells.summary: You quickly view your surroundings from a variety of angles, your senses constructing an overall mental picture.

spells.name: Foresee the Path
spells.summary: You see just a split second into the future and glean how an enemy will move.

spells.name: Thermal Stasis
spells.summary: The same abilities that let you raise or lower thermal energy also let you keep it at a safe medium.

spells.name: Entropic Wheel
spells.summary: You stockpile thermal energy in a magical wheel-like construct that lets you burn opponents with cold or freeze their bodies with heat.

spells.name: Redistribute Potential
spells.summary: Energy attempts to balance out, but with your magic, you can shunt all the energy in one area to another.

spells.name: Forbidden Thought
spells.summary: You place a psychic lock in a foe's mind that prevents it from a specific action.

spells.name: Shatter Mind
spells.summary: You telepathically assail the minds of your foes.

spells.name: Contagious Idea
spells.summary: You place either a pleasant thought or a terrifying one in a creature's mind

spells.name: Imaginary Weapon
spells.summary: You create a simple weapon of force and lash out, its arc following your hand.

spells.name: Astral Rain
spells.summary: You fling a mass of furious thoughts into the air, where they expand into numerous blades or other shapes that rain down.

spells.name: Hologram Cage
spells.summary: You weave light into a cube of vivid and fantastic patterns.

spells.name: Distortion Lens
spells.summary: You create a magical lens that distorts space as best suits you.

spells.name: Ghostly Shift
spells.summary: Your body becomes insubstantial as you partially phase out.

spells.name: Tesseract Tunnel
spells.summary: You race from point to point, tearing open a tunnel in space.

spells.name: False Nature
spells.summary: You create an illusion that makes an object seem to be something entirely different.

spells.name: Bilocation
spells.summary: You exist in two places at once.

spells.name: Bracing Tendrils
spells.summary: Visible tendrils of force anchor your body to the ground, preventing unwanted movement.

spells.name: Empty Pack
spells.summary: You render every item inside the container you touch invisible, although the container itself remains visible.

spells.name: Etheric Shards
spells.summary: You reach out and sow glittering splinters of force throughout the area, otherworldly caltrops of will and ectoplasm.

spells.name: Falling Sky
spells.summary: Extraordinary telekinetic pressure smashes down through the area, battering creatures within it to the ground.

spells.name: Focusing Hum
spells.summary: You infuse the air around you with a sustained hum that allows creatures within it to resist distractions.

spells.name: Implement of Destruction
spells.summary: You solemnly declare that the target weapon will bring death to a foe.

spells.name: Kinetic Ram
spells.summary: Gathering kinetic energy, you either focus it in a straight line or disperse it as an encircling ripple.

spells.name: Momentary Recovery
spells.summary: You instantly teleport yourself and any items you're wearing or holding from your current space to a clear space within range that you can see.

spells.name: Moth's Supper
spells.summary: You sigh, and your breath transforms into delicate, black-winged butterflies and huge death's-head hawkmoths.

spells.name: Phase Bolt
spells.summary: You point your finger and project a bolt of magical energy that stutters in and out of phase until it reaches the target.

spells.name: Poltergeist's Fury
spells.summary: Your fury spills over in a telekinetic storm of terrifying proportions.

spells.name: Rally Point
spells.summary: You mark the area touched as a rally point.

spells.name: Sea of Thought
spells.summary: You cover the area in a sloshing torrent of semi-solidified thought, roughly ankle high.

spells.name: Shadow Spy
spells.summary: You mix blood, soil, and shadow together to form a half-real homunculus in the shape of a crow, sparrow, or other bird.

spells.name: Soft Landing
spells.summary: You create a magical field that buoys any creature or object falling into the area.

spells.name: Telekinetic Bombardment
spells.summary: You grasp a piece of the landscape—such as a tree, carriage, or piece of masonry—and lob it in your foe's direction.

spells.name: Warp Step
spells.summary: When you walk, the earth warps beneath your feet—your steps extend, distance contracts, and everything is just a little bit closer.

spells.name: Cinder Gaze
spells.summary: You've learned to read the future in the patterns of flames and smoke.

spells.name: Euphoric Renewal
spells.summary: You view death not as an ending but a beginning, and you delight in dancing on its edge.

spells.name: Frenzied Revelry
spells.summary: You recall memories of hedonistic rites to send yourself into an infectious frenzy, dancing and howling wildly to encourage your companions to join in.

spells.name: Hollow Heart
spells.summary: You stoke the target's ambition beyond reason, until it believes no one is capable of helping it.

spells.name: Isolation
spells.summary: You summon a tangible manifestation of loneliness to cloak the target from view as surely as if it were wreathed in darkness.

spells.name: Inevitable Destination
spells.summary: You twist the paths of the target, ensuring that each one leads to you.

spells.name: Purifying Veil
spells.summary: Drawing on the purifying powers of water, you call forth a veil of fine water droplets suffused with holy energy.

spells.name: Shaken Confidence
spells.summary: You mock the target for all its failings, twisting its self- confidence into doubt.

spells.name: String of Fate
spells.summary: You bond yourself to a cherished friend, vowing to share their fate for good or for ill.

spells.name: Victory Cry
spells.summary: Your true might comes from your bonds with your allies, and you glory in their achievements.

spells.name: Weaponize Secret
spells.summary: You understand that holding a secret is in itself a kind of power.

spells.name: Wind Whispers
spells.summary: You call forth numerous breezes in which you weave gossip, whispering subtly into the ears of those around.

spells.name: Wordsmith
spells.summary: You're a devotee of knowledge with an unmatched command of the language used to spread that knowledge.

spells.name: Pact Broker
spells.summary: You offer to broker a pact of peace.

spells.name: Return the Favor
spells.summary: You're unable to leave any debts unpaid.

spells.name: Over the Coals
spells.summary: You accuse the target of breaking its word to you and invoke the wrath of your patron to claim what's due, demanding the target pay you in currency, fulfill an order, or stand down.

spells.name: Awaken Entropy
spells.summary: All things age, all things die, and at the end of days, even the universe will grow quiet and still.

spells.name: Behold the Weave
spells.summary: You behold the many timelines that weave around a creature, and in so doing, you make one more likely to occur.

spells.name: Loose Time's Arrow
spells.summary: You pluck the time stream like a bow—pull one string back, release, and watch a creature fly.

spells.name: Morass of Ages
spells.summary: You surround yourself in temporal eddies that draw out time for those around you, making every step feel like an eternity endured.

spells.name: Quicken Time
spells.summary: You speed up the time stream in an area, stretching and pulling it until time flows swift and wild.

spells.name: Stagnate Time
spells.summary: You examine the time stream in a particular area, then proceed to stick a few metaphorical pins into it, thickening and slowing down the flow of time until it rumbles along like a river of molasses.

spells.name: Summon Irii
spells.summary: You cast your spell, whisper your words of power, and find that an irii is already here.

spells.name: Suspended Retribution
spells.summary: All life dances one step from the precipice, one heartbeat from disaster.

spells.name: Temporal Twin
spells.summary: You pull a fleeting duplicate of your ally from the recent past

spells.name: Time Beacon
spells.summary: You create a beacon in time to return to it if things go wrong

spells.name: Time Pocket
spells.summary: You fling the target item forward in time and link it to the future of the creature holding it.

spells.name: Time Sense
spells.summary: When you Cast the Spell, you gain a perfect sense of time.

spells.name: Path of Least Resistance
spells.summary: You trace several possible routes, quickly resetting the timeline until you find the safest one.

spells.name: Temporal Distortion
spells.summary: You share some of your own temporal distortions with a foe, altering their mind and body unpredictably as they're thrown backward or forward in time.

spells.name: Time Skip
spells.summary: You manipulate time around your ally, pushing them forward a few moments in time.

spells.name: Manifold Lives
spells.summary: You cast a creature's mind back through time, forcing them to take other paths and make other choices, experiencing countless alternate lives in an instant.

spells.name: Waking Dream
spells.summary: You cloud the target's mind with vivid, dreamlike imagery, so they have difficulty distinguishing real threats from imagined ones.

spells.name: Wish Market
spells.summary: You signal your willingness to make a deal, attracting ghostly merchants that eagerly and silently wave contracts for your consideration while demanding an esoteric price.

spells.name: Anchoring Air
spells.summary: You solidify the air around an incoming attack, catching it in a vise-like grip

spells.name: Connective Current
spells.summary: You create a magical connection between you and an enemy, as if you were both caught in the same current.

spells.name: Shipwreck
spells.summary: You gesture toward a vehicle and the vessel wrenches itself apart.

spells.name: Undertow
spells.summary: You create an area of water 20 feet deep.

spells.name: Whispers of a Dead Goddess
spells.summary: The mysterious whispers that fill the Mordant Spire, which some believe to be the voice of the dead goddess Acavna, become audible.

spells.name: With Friends Like These
spells.summary: You create a subtle dissonance between creatures, driving them apart. Each target must attempt a Will save.
